# Branch Protection Checklist

Apply these controls on the default branch:

1. Require pull request before merge.
2. Require at least one approving review.
3. Dismiss stale approvals on new commits.
4. Require status checks to pass.
5. Require branch up to date before merge.
6. Block force pushes.
7. Block branch deletion.
8. Enable secret scanning and push protection.
9. Enable code scanning visibility.
10. Restrict direct pushes to maintainers.

This document is operational guidance for GitHub repository settings.
